label: Primary research fit
description: How well the program fits her main research agenda

label: Secondary research fit
description: How well the program supports adjacent interests if her agenda evolves

label: Best advisor fit
description: How good the strongest possible advising relationship looks

label: Second advisor fit
description: Whether there is a strong backup adviser if the first match changes

label: Advisor bench depth
description: How many faculty could seriously advise her in the area

label: Advisor personality fit
description: Whether likely advisers feel constructive rather than draining

label: Mentoring reputation
description: How well faculty are known to support graduate students

label: Faculty enthusiasm for Camille
description: Whether the department seems excited to invest in her specifically

label: Intellectual community
description: Strength of seminars conversations and scholarly community

label: Methods training
description: Fit between the program and her preferred methods training needs

label: Interdisciplinary opportunities
description: Ability to draw on other departments centers and workshops

label: Research collaboration
description: Availability of opportunities to coauthor or join faculty projects

label: Topic flexibility
description: How easy it would be to change topic or emphasis later

label: Dissertation support
description: Expected quality of support in the dissertation phase

label: Teaching training
description: Quality of training for becoming a capable teacher

label: Training over labor extraction
description: Whether graduate work feels like training rather than cheap labor

label: Annual stipend value
description: How strong the guaranteed annual pay is in real terms

label: Funding guarantee length
description: How secure multi-year funding looks

label: Fellowship generosity
description: How much funding arrives without service obligations

label: Additional fellowship support
description: One time or extra awards that improve financial slack

label: Teaching load sustainability
description: Whether the required teaching load looks manageable

label: Summer funding
description: Whether summer pay or funding is reliably available

label: Travel and research funding
description: Support for conferences fieldwork archives and data needs

label: Health insurance
description: Quality and affordability of the health insurance package

label: Housing affordability
description: How affordable housing will feel on the stipend

label: Housing security
description: How predictable and stable housing access looks

label: Overall cost of living
description: How far the stipend goes after everyday expenses

label: Ability to save
description: Whether she can build a cushion instead of living at the edge

label: Low financial stress risk
description: Likelihood that money worries stay manageable

label: Administrative clarity
description: How clearly funding rules deadlines and logistics are communicated

label: Low stress culture
description: Whether day to day life feels sustainable rather than constantly intense

label: Fit for anxiety management
description: Whether the environment helps rather than worsens anxiety

label: Fit for workaholism management
description: Whether the culture limits toxic overwork rather than rewarding it

label: Routine stability
description: How easy it seems to build stable habits sleep and daily structure

label: Weather and daily quality
description: How much the location improves ordinary life and energy

label: Access to nature
description: Availability of outdoor decompression and space

label: Mental health support
description: Quality and accessibility of counseling or related support

label: Overall emotional sustainability
description: Whether she can imagine thriving there for five to seven years

label: Faculty warmth
description: Whether faculty interactions feel human encouraging and respectful

label: Cohort collegiality
description: Whether graduate students seem mutually supportive rather than cutthroat

label: Respect and belonging
description: Whether she is likely to feel valued and included in the department

label: Support over intimidation
description: Whether the atmosphere feels supportive rather than intimidating

label: Transparency of expectations
description: How clearly milestones standards and norms are communicated

label: Administrative competence
description: How functional the department appears on routine student matters

label: Low toxic competitiveness risk
description: How unlikely it is that status games dominate the culture

label: Ability to ask for help
description: Whether needing help seems acceptable and safe

label: Placement strength
description: How well graduates land strong jobs overall

label: Prestige and brand
description: How much outside prestige may help on the job market

label: Niche reputation
description: Reputation in her specific subfield rather than only overall prestige

label: Letter writer strength
description: Likelihood of getting strong letters from visible faculty

label: Publication support
description: How strongly the program helps students publish early

label: External network access
description: Access to conferences workshops and leading scholars

label: Career optionality
description: How well the training supports both academic and nonacademic exits

label: Support network access
description: Ease of staying connected to important people

label: Lifestyle fit
description: How well the city or town fits the life she actually wants

label: Ease of building community
description: How easy it seems to build friendships and life outside the department

label: Overall livability
description: Whether daily life there feels pleasant and workable

label: Information certainty
description: How much solid information she has relative to guesswork

label: Advisor redundancy
description: Whether success depends on one professor rather than several viable mentors

label: Confidence against regret
description: How likely she is to feel at peace with the choice two years from now

label: Confidence in admissions process
description: Whether the admissions process itself increases trust in the option

label: Administrative switching ease
description: How easy it is to change plans without significant fallout

label: Decision reversibility
description: How much room there is to recover if the choice proves wrong
